privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for vtiger_crm_env build_account_hierarchy task by verifying that the data is synthetically generated via the task instructions. Confirmed all expected values (parent organization 'Apex Global Holdings' with Finance industry and 150000000 revenue, subsidiaries 'Apex Global - North America' and 'Apex Global - EMEA', and contact 'Elias Vance' with 'VP of Global Procurement' title) explicitly match the task description, setup_task.sh and export_result.sh SQL queries, and verifier.py logic.
